title: felicia boehmii
intro: Felicia boehmii, also known as Blue Felicia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Felicia boehmii include its ability to alleviate skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural antihistamine. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
